# uuid.airat.top

Summary:
UUID.airat.top is a static, privacy-first UUID v4 generator with single and batch output (1 to 10,000). Everything runs locally in the browser using secure randomness.

Primary URL:
https://uuid.airat.top

Key features:
- UUID v4 generator with batch output from 1 to 10,000 values.
- One-click copy, regenerate, and TXT download actions.
- Local settings persistence for count.

Tech stack:
HTML, CSS, and vanilla JavaScript.

Privacy:
No history or analytics; only local settings are stored. All generation happens locally.

Contact:
AiratTop - mail@airat.top
